name: verify_license
description: Verify a software license key for a product to check its validity, uses remaining, and associated purchase details. Essential for software products that require activation or seat management.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The product ID that the license key belongs to.

parameters.name: license_key
parameters.description: The license key string to verify.

parameters.name: increment_uses_count
parameters.description: If true, increments the uses count of the license key. Defaults to true.
